title: New journal papers
text: Two papers published in IEEE Transactions on Green Communications and Networking and Journal of Lightwave Technology on hybrid quantum-classical optical networks.

title: Promoted to Associate Professor
text: Appointed Associate Professor in the School of Computer Science at University College Dublin.

title: Horizon Europe grant
text: Awarded €216,028 as part of the QUADRATURE project on scalable multi-chip quantum architectures (2023–2027).

title: New modules
text: Now coordinating Team Software Project, Distributed Systems, and Software Engineering at UCD.
